scripts.mcp:test: PYTHONPATH=services/mcp-telemetry/src .venv/bin/pytest -q services/mcp-telemetry/tests && PYTHONPATH=services/mcp-retrieval/src .venv/bin/pytest -q services/mcp-retrieval/tests && PYTHONPATH=services/mcp-incidents/src .venv/bin/pytest -q services/mcp-incidents/tests
scripts.quality:check: npm run web:lint && npm run web:test && npm run web:build && npm run docs:links && npm run orchestrator:test && npm run mcp:test
